HGSS.481.0000:
I’m the Chairman of the
Pokémon Fan Club.\f
I’ve raised over 150 Pokémon.\f
I’m very fussy when it comes
to Pokémon.\f
Did you visit just to hear about
my Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.481.0001:
Good! Then listen up!\f
So...my precious RAPIDASH...\f
It’s...cute...lovely...smart...
adorable...irresistible...plus...\r
amazing... Don’t you think so?\r
Oh, so...wild...beautiful...\r
kind... I love it!\f
Hug it... It’s warm and cuddly...
Oh, it’s...spectacular...captivating...\r
simply divine... I treasure it...\r
Oops! Look at the time! I’ve kept\r
you too long!\f
Thanks for hearing me out. I want to
give you this present!\f
HGSS.481.0003:
It’s a Rare Candy that makes
Pokémon stronger.\f
I prefer making my Pokémon stronger
by battling, so you can have it.
HGSS.481.0004:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Did you come see me about my
Pokémon again?\f
No? Oh... I had more tales to tell...
HGSS.481.0005:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Did you come see me about my
Pokémon again?\f
No? Oh... I had more tales to tell...
HGSS.481.0006:
How disappointing...\f
Come back if you want to listen
to me again!
HGSS.481.0008:
Our Chairman is very vocal when it
comes to Pokémon...
HGSS.481.0009:
I love the way CLEFAIRY opens up
its arms!\f
It’s so adorable!
HGSS.481.0010:
I love CLEFAIRY, but I could never
catch one.\f
So I’m making do with a Poké Doll
that I found.
HGSS.481.0011:
I love CLEFAIRY, but I could never
catch one. So I’m making do with a\r
Poké Doll that I found.\f
What?
The girl who lost this Poké Doll\r
is sad...!\f
OK. Could you take this Poké Doll
back to that poor little girl?\f
I’ll befriend a real CLEFAIRY on
my own one day!\f
HGSS.481.0013:
You watch. I’m going to get a
real CLEFAIRY as my friend.
HGSS.481.0014:
Look at my darling BAYLEEF!\f
The leaf on its head is so cute
and fashionable!
HGSS.481.0015:
It’s a CLEFAIRY!
Huh?\f
Oh, right. It’s a CLEFAIRY Poké Doll.
HGSS.481.0017:
Let’s all listen politely to
other Trainers.
HGSS.481.0018: If someone brags, brag right back!
